action_mappings.release_ledger_entry_from_case: release ledger entry {} from audit exception case {}

action_mappings_indef.unreserve_ledger_account_from_case: unreserve a ledger account {} from an audit exception case {}

action_mappings_indef.approve_case: approve an audit exception case {} by an approver {}

action_mappings_indef.release_ledger_entry_from_case: release a ledger entry {} from an audit exception case {}

predicate_mappings.case_feed_confirmed: {} has been confirmed in the feed
predicate_mappings.external_case_associated_audit_check: {} is associated with the external audit check {}
predicate_mappings.case_has_reference_document_association: {} has an association with the reference document {}
predicate_mappings.case_has_account_mapping_association: {} has an association with the account mapping {}
predicate_mappings.case_has_audit_check_link: {} has a link to the audit check {}
predicate_mappings.case_reference_links_to_audit_check: {} has a reference link to the audit check {}

register_audit_exception_case.description: register an audit exception case A as a registered case
preconditions: I can only register an audit exception case A as a registered case if it is not the case that A is a registered case and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I register an audit exception case A as a registered case, it is the case that A is a registered case

reserve_ledger_account_for_case.description: reserve a ledger account B for an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a ledger account B for an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
I can only reserve a ledger account B for an audit exception case A if it is not the case that A has an account link
effects: Once I reserve a ledger account B for an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has reserved the ledger account B and A has an account link
Once I reserve a ledger account B for an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unreserve_ledger_account_from_case.description: unreserve a ledger account B from an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only unreserve a ledger account B from an audit exception case A if it is the case that A has reserved the ledger account B
I can only unreserve a ledger account B from an audit exception case A if it is not the case that A has passed validation and it is not the case that A is ready for posting
effects: Once I unreserve a ledger account B from an audit exception case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I unreserve a ledger account B from an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the ledger account B and it is not the case anymore that A has an account link and it is not the case anymore that A has been feed validated and it is not the case anymore that A has been reconciled and it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation and it is not the case anymore that A is finalized and it is not the case anymore that A is marked for manual review

attach_statement_feed_to_case.description: attach a statement feed B to an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only attach a statement feed B to an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available
effects: Once I attach a statement feed B to an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has an attached statement feed B
Once I attach a statement feed B to an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_statement_feed_from_case.description: detach a statement feed B from an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only detach a statement feed B from an audit exception case A if it is the case that A has an attached statement feed B
effects: Once I detach a statement feed B from an audit exception case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a statement feed B from an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that A has an attached statement feed B

validate_feed_for_case.description: validate a statement feed B for an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only validate a statement feed B for an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and A has an account link and A has an attached statement feed B
I can only validate a statement feed B for an audit exception case A if it is not the case that A has been feed validated
effects: Once I validate a statement feed B for an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has been feed validated

approve_case.description: approve an audit exception case A by an approver B
preconditions: I can only approve an audit exception case A by an approver B if it is the case that A is a registered case and A has an account link and B is available
I can only approve an audit exception case A by an approver B if it is not the case that A has been feed validated
effects: Once I approve an audit exception case A by an approver B, it is the case that A has been feed validated and A requires escalation
Once I approve an audit exception case A by an approver B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

attach_analyst_evidence.description: attach analyst evidence to an audit exception case A using a statement feed B by an analyst C
preconditions: I can only attach analyst evidence to an audit exception case A using a statement feed B by an analyst C if it is the case that A has been feed validated and A has an account link and A has an attached statement feed B and C is available
I can only attach analyst evidence to an audit exception case A using a statement feed B by an analyst C if it is not the case that A has been reconciled
effects: Once I attach analyst evidence to an audit exception case A using a statement feed B by an analyst C, it is the case that A has been reconciled
Once I attach analyst evidence to an audit exception case A using a statement feed B by an analyst C, it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation

apply_audit_check_for_case.description: apply an audit check B to an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only apply an audit check B to an audit exception case A if it is the case that A has an account link and A passed the audit check B
I can only apply an audit check B to an audit exception case A if it is not the case that A has been reconciled
effects: Once I apply an audit check B to an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has been reconciled
Once I apply an audit check B to an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation

reserve_ledger_entry_for_case.description: reserve a ledger entry B for an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a ledger entry B for an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a ledger entry B for an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has reserved the ledger entry B
Once I reserve a ledger entry B for an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_ledger_entry_from_case.description: release a ledger entry B from an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only release a ledger entry B from an audit exception case A if it is the case that A has reserved the ledger entry B
effects: Once I release a ledger entry B from an audit exception case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a ledger entry B from an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the ledger entry B

reserve_counterparty_for_case.description: reserve a counterparty record B for an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a counterparty record B for an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a counterparty record B for an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has reserved the counterparty B
Once I reserve a counterparty record B for an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_counterparty_from_case.description: release a counterparty record B from an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only release a counterparty record B from an audit exception case A if it is the case that A has reserved the counterparty B
effects: Once I release a counterparty record B from an audit exception case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a counterparty record B from an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the counterparty B

reserve_source_file_for_case.description: reserve a source file B for an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a source file B for an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a source file B for an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has reserved the source file B
Once I reserve a source file B for an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_source_file_from_case.description: release a source file B from an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only release a source file B from an audit exception case A if it is the case that A has reserved the source file B
effects: Once I release a source file B from an audit exception case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a source file B from an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the source file B

reserve_account_mapping_for_case.description: reserve an account mapping B for an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an account mapping B for an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and A has an association with the account mapping B
effects: Once I reserve an account mapping B for an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has reserved the account mapping B
Once I reserve an account mapping B for an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_account_mapping_from_case.description: release an account mapping B from an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only release an account mapping B from an audit exception case A if it is the case that A has reserved the account mapping B
effects: Once I release an account mapping B from an audit exception case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an account mapping B from an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the account mapping B

assemble_reconciliation_batch.description: assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a ledger entry C and a counterparty record D
preconditions: I can only assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a ledger entry C and a counterparty record D if it is the case that A has an account link and A has reserved the ledger entry C and A has reserved the counterparty D and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
I can only assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a ledger entry C and a counterparty record D if it is not the case that A has passed validation
effects: Once I assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a ledger entry C and a counterparty record D, it is the case that A is assigned the recon batch B and A has passed validation
Once I assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a ledger entry C and a counterparty record D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assemble_reconciliation_with_source_and_.description: assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a source file C and a reference document D
preconditions: I can only assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a source file C and a reference document D if it is the case that A has an account link and A has reserved the source file C and D is available and B is available and B is eligible for the case A and A has an association with the reference document D
I can only assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a source file C and a reference document D if it is not the case that A has passed validation
effects: Once I assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a source file C and a reference document D, it is the case that A is assigned the recon batch B and A has passed validation and A is marked for manual review and A requires escalation

Once I assemble a recon batch B for an audit exception case A using a source file C and a reference document D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_manual_review_and_escalation.description: clear manual review and escalation for an audit exception case A using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C
preconditions: I can only clear manual review and escalation for an audit exception case A using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C if it is the case that A has passed validation and A is marked for manual review and A has reserved the ledger entry B and A has reserved the counterparty C
effects: Once I clear manual review and escalation for an audit exception case A using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C, it is not the case anymore that A is marked for manual review and it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation

route_case_to_processing_queue.description: route an audit exception case A to a processing queue D using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C
preconditions: I can only route an audit exception case A to a processing queue D using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C if it is the case that A has been reconciled and A has passed validation and A has reserved the ledger entry B and A has reserved the counterparty C and A is assigned to the queue D

I can only route an audit exception case A to a processing queue D using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C if it is not the case that A requires escalation and it is not the case that A is ready for posting
effects: Once I route an audit exception case A to a processing queue D using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C, it is the case that A is ready for posting

route_case_to_escalation_queue.description: route an audit exception case A to an escalation queue D using a source file B and an account mapping C
preconditions: I can only route an audit exception case A to an escalation queue D using a source file B and an account mapping C if it is the case that A has been reconciled and A has passed validation and A has reserved the source file B and A has reserved the account mapping C and A is assigned to the queue D
I can only route an audit exception case A to an escalation queue D using a source file B and an account mapping C if it is not the case that A is ready for posting
effects: Once I route an audit exception case A to an escalation queue D using a source file B and an account mapping C, it is the case that A is ready for posting and A requires escalation

post_case_and_finalize.description: post and finalize an audit exception case A using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C
preconditions: I can only post and finalize an audit exception case A using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C if it is the case that A is ready for posting and A requires escalation and A has reserved the ledger entry B and A has reserved the counterparty C
effects: Once I post and finalize an audit exception case A using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C, it is the case that A is finalized

Once I post and finalize an audit exception case A using a ledger entry B and a counterparty record C, it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation and it is not the case anymore that A has been reconciled and it is not the case anymore that A is marked for manual review

reattach_feed_and_revalidate_case.description: reattach a statement feed B and revalidate an audit exception case A with an analyst C
preconditions: I can only reattach a statement feed B and revalidate an audit exception case A with an analyst C if it is the case that A is finalized and A is ready for posting and A has an account link and A has an attached statement feed B and C is available
I can only reattach a statement feed B and revalidate an audit exception case A with an analyst C if it is not the case that A has been reconciled
effects: Once I reattach a statement feed B and revalidate an audit exception case A with an analyst C, it is the case that A has been reconciled

confirm_statement_feed_attachment.description: confirm attachment of a statement feed B to an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only confirm attachment of a statement feed B to an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is ready for posting and A has been reconciled and A has an attached statement feed B
I can only confirm attachment of a statement feed B to an audit exception case A if it is not the case that A requires escalation and it is not the case that A has been confirmed in the feed
effects: Once I confirm attachment of a statement feed B to an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has been confirmed in the feed

approver_confirm_feed_attachment.description: approver an approver B confirms feed attachment for an audit exception case A
preconditions: I can only approver an approver B confirms feed attachment for an audit exception case A if it is the case that A is ready for posting and A has been reconciled and B is available
I can only approver an approver B confirms feed attachment for an audit exception case A if it is not the case that A requires escalation and it is not the case that A has been confirmed in the feed
effects: Once I approver an approver B confirms feed attachment for an audit exception case A, it is the case that A has been confirmed in the feed
Once I approver an approver B confirms feed attachment for an audit exception case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

associate_case_with_audit_check.description: associate an audit exception case A with an audit check B
preconditions: I can only associate an audit exception case A with an audit check B if it is the case that A has been confirmed in the feed and B is available and A has a reference link to the audit check B
effects: Once I associate an audit exception case A with an audit check B, it is the case that A has a link to the audit check B
Once I associate an audit exception case A with an audit check B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

register_external_case_reference_and_lin.description: register an external case reference A and link an audit check C to a case reference B
preconditions: I can only register an external case reference A and link an audit check C to a case reference B if it is the case that A is a registered case and A has an external reference and A is associated with the external audit check C and B has a link to the audit check C
I can only register an external case reference A and link an audit check C to a case reference B if it is not the case that A passed the audit check C
effects: Once I register an external case reference A and link an audit check C to a case reference B, it is the case that A passed the audit check C

attach_analyst_evidence_and_mark.description: attach evidence from an analyst C to an audit exception case A and mark a statement feed B
preconditions: I can only attach evidence from an analyst C to an audit exception case A and mark a statement feed B if it is the case that A is a registered case and A has an external reference and A has been reconciled and A has been confirmed in the feed and A has an attached statement feed B and C is available
I can only attach evidence from an analyst C to an audit exception case A and mark a statement feed B if it is not the case that evidence is attached to A
effects: Once I attach evidence from an analyst C to an audit exception case A and mark a statement feed B, it is the case that evidence is attached to A

close_case_if_validated.description: close an audit exception case A if validated
preconditions: I can only close an audit exception case A if validated if it is the case that the triage for A is complete and A is a registered case and A has an account link and A has passed validation and A is ready for posting and A has been confirmed in the feed and A has been reconciled
I can only close an audit exception case A if validated if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close an audit exception case A if validated, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_audit_check.description: close an audit exception case A with an audit check B
preconditions: I can only close an audit exception case A with an audit check B if it is the case that A has an external reference and A is a registered case and A has an account link and A has passed validation and A is ready for posting and A has been confirmed in the feed and A has been reconciled and A passed the audit check B
I can only close an audit exception case A with an audit check B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close an audit exception case A with an audit check B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_evidence.description: close an audit exception case A with attached evidence
preconditions: I can only close an audit exception case A with attached evidence if it is the case that A has an external reference and A is a registered case and A has an account link and A has passed validation and A is ready for posting and A has been confirmed in the feed and A has been reconciled and evidence is attached to A
I can only close an audit exception case A with attached evidence if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close an audit exception case A with attached evidence, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.register_audit_exception_case: register audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} as a registered case
action_nl_templates.reserve_ledger_account_for_case: reserve ledger account {?ledger_account} for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.unreserve_ledger_account_from_case: unreserve ledger account {?ledger_account} from audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_statement_feed_to_case: attach statement feed {?statement_feed} to audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_statement_feed_from_case: detach statement feed {?statement_feed} from audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.validate_feed_for_case: validate statement feed {?statement_feed} for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.approve_case: approve audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} by approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.attach_analyst_evidence: attach analyst evidence to audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} using statement feed {?statement_feed} by analyst {?analyst}
action_nl_templates.apply_audit_check_for_case: apply audit check {?audit_check} to audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_ledger_entry_for_case: reserve ledger entry {?ledger_entry} for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.release_ledger_entry_from_case: release ledger entry {?ledger_entry} from audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_counterparty_for_case: reserve counterparty record {?counterparty_record} for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.release_counterparty_from_case: release counterparty record {?counterparty_record} from audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_source_file_for_case: reserve source file {?source_file} for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.release_source_file_from_case: release source file {?source_file} from audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_account_mapping_for_case: reserve account mapping {?account_mapping} for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.release_account_mapping_from_case: release account mapping {?account_mapping} from audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}
action_nl_templates.assemble_reconciliation_batch: assemble recon batch {?recon_batch} for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} using ledger entry {?ledger_entry} and counterparty record {?counterparty_record}
action_nl_templates.assemble_reconciliation_with_source_and_: assemble recon batch {?recon_batch} for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} using source file {?source_file} and reference document {?reference_document}
action_nl_templates.clear_manual_review_and_escalation: clear manual review and escalation for audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} using ledger entry {?ledger_entry} and counterparty record {?counterparty_record}
action_nl_templates.route_case_to_processing_queue: route audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} to processing queue {?processing_queue} using ledger entry {?ledger_entry} and counterparty record {?counterparty_record}
action_nl_templates.route_case_to_escalation_queue: route audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} to escalation queue {?escalation_queue} using source file {?source_file} and account mapping {?account_mapping}
action_nl_templates.post_case_and_finalize: post and finalize audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} using ledger entry {?ledger_entry} and counterparty record {?counterparty_record}

action_nl_templates.confirm_statement_feed_attachment: confirm attachment of statement feed {?statement_feed} to audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}

action_nl_templates.associate_case_with_audit_check: associate audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} with audit check {?audit_check}

action_nl_templates.attach_analyst_evidence_and_mark: attach evidence from analyst {?analyst} to audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} and mark statement feed {?statement_feed}
action_nl_templates.close_case_if_validated: close audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} if validated
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_audit_check: close audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} with audit check {?audit_check}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_evidence: close audit exception case {?audit_exception_case} with attached evidence

action_nl_templates_indef.release_account_mapping_from_case: release an account mapping {?account_mapping} from an audit exception case {?audit_exception_case}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a generic object is also a object

Everything that is a audit exception case or a ledger account or a recon batch or a counterparty record or a ledger entry or a source file or a statement feed or a approver or a audit check or a analyst or a reference document or a account mapping or a control queue is also a generic object
Everything that is a processing queue or a escalation queue is also a control queue
Everything that is a case reference or a external case reference is also a audit exception case
